The body reads ἀνέβλεψεν across the line break; the transcript dropped the repeated prefix at the start of the next line.
Body has εὐλογεῖν; φοβεῖσθαι is from a different reading and was imported into the body.
The apparatus line begins with the continuation πώντές, not πῶντές.
Printed apparatus reads τὴ πόλει without iota subscript.

The apparatus reads τὸ κατάλειμμά μου τοῦ σπέρματός μου? No: image clearly has τὸ κατάλειμμά μου τοῦ σπέρματός μου omitted? Actually printed text here is μακάριος ἔσομαι ἂν γέννηται τὸ κατάλειμμά μου τοῦ σπέρματός μου? The transcript's μου after κατάλειμμά is wrong span.

corrections.correct: τὸ κατάλειμμά μου τοῦ σπέρματός μου ἰδεῖν
corrections.note: A phrase appears omitted after κατάλειμμά μου in the apparatus.
Apparatus text has Τωβείτ, not final theta.
The beginning of this line is misread; the printed text appears to continue with age notation, not 2καὶ ἐβλέψ[ε].
Sigla spacing is collapsed in the transcript.

uncertain.note: The image is somewhat hard to parse in this stretch; there may be an omitted phrase involving τοῦ σπέρματός μου, but exact segmentation is uncertain.
The transcript's opening of verse 2 in the apparatus is clearly wrong, but the exact printed reading is difficult to recover with full confidence from the scan.

notes: Running head matches. Main body is mostly correct, but the final words of XIV 2 in the body were replaced by an apparatus reading, and ἀνέβλεψεν was broken incorrectly across the line. Apparatus contains several transcription issues; one long stretch in XIV 2 is difficult to read precisely from the scan.
